title: onobrychis citrina
intro: Onobrychis citrina, also known as yellow melilot, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues, and it has been used to treat a range of health problems, including gastrointestinal issues and menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, yellow melilot is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and is also sometimes used in topical applications to aid in wound healing and skin care.
